visual_analysis.description: A green and white soda can, labeled Sprite, located behind an orange bottle.
An orange plastic bottle with a blue cap, labeled Caffino, sitting in front of the green soda can.
A red soda can, labeled Coca-Cola, to the right of the orange bottle.
A white can with purple and pink graphics, labeled Milkis, to the right of the red soda can.
A brown cardboard box in the background behind all the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: The orange bottle is in front of the target green soda can and must be moved to provide access.
Pick the green soda can now that the path is clear.
